subject: Polish, performance, and responsive fine-tuning
description:
Final quality pass. Ship-ready.

Walk the repo first: read CLAUDE.md for full current state.

Work:
- Run Lighthouse on all three pages, target >= 85 performance score
- Image optimization: lazy loading, appropriate sizing, alt text
- Loading states: skeleton screens or graceful placeholders during route transitions
- Hover micro-interactions on all cards (lift + shadow per design system)
- Verify no horizontal overflow at 375px on any page
- Verify all CTAs are tappable on mobile (min 44x44px touch targets)
- Check font rendering (font-display: swap to avoid FOIT)
- Error boundaries around major page sections
- Console clean: no warnings, no errors
- Cross-browser spot check if time permits

This task is intentionally broad. Focus on what feels rough, not a checklist.

Write back to CLAUDE.md:
- Lighthouse scores achieved
- Performance optimizations applied
- Known rough edges or trade-offs accepted

changes: Added loading=lazy on non-hero images, fetchPriority=high on hero
ScrollToTop component for route-change scroll reset
Responsive fixes: verification steps wrap, stats grids 2-col on mobile
Touch target increase on update toggle
learnings: git rm handles staged deletes - don't re-add in git add
rm alias (trash) fails silently on some paths in sandbox
